implementation_instruction: Use the addendum only to refine the S20 implementation prompt after the S20 planning decision.
forbidden_action: Do not implement S20 or change committed planning artifacts.

implementation_instruction: Treat the S20 planning decision as prompt authorization only, not data-construction authorization.

object_or_rule: ME and NRC asset-account GPIM registers
implementation_instruction: Preserve the component lineage I_nominal_j -> P_K_j -> I_real_j -> GPIM survival/depletion -> K_gross_j for each asset/account j.
forbidden_action: Do not construct aggregate capital before component GPIM registers.

implementation_instruction: Survival or depletion profiles must remain ME-specific and NRC-specific in the GPIM lineage.
forbidden_action: Do not apply one primitive aggregate survival/depletion profile to total capital.

implementation_instruction: Any independent aggregate GPIM route requires a separate proof and protocol before use.
forbidden_action: Do not impose a total-capital GPIM profile in S20.

implementation_instruction: S20 may only plan K_GROSS_GPIM_TOTAL = K_GROSS_GPIM_ME + K_GROSS_GPIM_NRC on common support from 1931.
forbidden_action: Do not claim equivalence with an independently constructed NFC aggregate GPIM stock.

implementation_instruction: Retain 1925-1930 as ME component-only observations with no aggregate values.
forbidden_action: Do not create partial-support aggregate values.

implementation_instruction: S20 validates lineage, units, support, and row-level component-sum identity only.
forbidden_action: Do not claim S20 independently proves GPIM stock-flow consistency.

implementation_instruction: A stronger stock-flow consistency audit would require a separate layer reopening S12D/S13 construction evidence.
forbidden_action: Do not reopen S12D/S13 evidence inside S20.

implementation_instruction: Future weights must be generated from the GPIM stock-flow system itself, such as gross replacement-cost, net current-cost, or nominal investment-flow shares.
forbidden_action: Do not construct GPIM-weighted aggregation in S20.

implementation_instruction: Index-number aggregation requires a separate value-register and index-number protocol.
forbidden_action: Do not construct Tornqvist, Divisia, or similar capital indexes in S20.

implementation_instruction: Weights may later summarize GPIM valuation or composition only.
forbidden_action: Do not smuggle theta, productivity, productive capacity, or utilization into S20 weights.

implementation_instruction: May construct preserved components, provisional common-support total, support/provenance/lineage flags, row-level identity checks, and blocked/parked ledgers.
forbidden_action: Do not construct independent aggregate GPIM, aggregate depletion, weighted aggregate, theta, productive capacity, utilization, accumulated q, or econometric results.

implementation_instruction: Future S20 implementation prompt must incorporate this addendum as a binding amendment.
forbidden_action: Do not proceed with S20 implementation prompt that omits these locks.
